mapper.select: SELECT id, store_id, code, size FROM bay ORDER BY store_id, code
SELECT id, store_id, code, size FROM bay WHERE store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY code
SELECT id, store_id, code, size FROM bay WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bay (id, store_id, code, size) VALUES (#{id}, #{storeId}, #{code}, #{size})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bay WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
